flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Sheridan Technical College rose 13% between 2000 and 2003 ($1.4k → $1.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Sheridan Technical College rose 13% between 2000 and 2003 ($5.4k → $6.1k).
